backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Task, Author, TaskSubmission, Invoice, Reward, UserProfile) and backend logic including user profile management, task submissions, rewards, and authorization via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented features (login, home dashboard, daily tasks, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object providing one-line summaries of each frontend page/component file, noting key UI features and a Tailwind class fix applied across pages.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'Super Gro', mounting the app at `#root` and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, an AppLayout with conditional Navigation/Footer, and auth-based index redirection.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with links to Terms, Disclaimer, Rules, and Support pages, plus copyright and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, admin-conditional link, and a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, admin checks, task fetching, task submission, and submission approval/cancellation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines an emerald/gold design token system using OKLCH CSS variables for light and dark modes, and adds custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that displays all task submissions across users, allowing admins to approve or reject pending submissions, with access control for non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/DailyTasksPage.tsx: Daily tasks page that lists predefined tasks (check-in, video, screenshot, referral, weekly bonus), shows submission status, and allows users to submit proof for each task.
frontend/src/pages/DisclaimerPage.tsx: Static disclaimer page displaying legal notices about non-guaranteed income, performance-based earnings, and voluntary participation for the Super Gro platform.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Dashboard home page showing a hero banner with user greeting, wallet balance card with direct/team income stats, and referral sharing options via clipboard, WhatsApp, and Telegram.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Multi-step login page handling mobile number entry, OTP verification (simulated), and Internet Identity authentication, followed by a profile creation step for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ReferralPage.tsx: Referral and team page displaying direct referral count, team size, level reached, income summary, and a level bonus table, with options to share the referral link via WhatsApp and Telegram.
frontend/src/pages/RulesPage.tsx: Static page listing six platform rules (e.g., activity-based earnings, withdrawal limits, account integrity) as styled cards with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/SupportPage.tsx: Support center page providing contact options via email, Telegram, and WhatsApp, each rendered as a card with the contact value and a branded action button.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Static terms and conditions page listing five numbered platform rules as cards, with a footer note showing the last updated date and a reservation-of-rights disclaimer.
frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx: React page for the user wallet showing available balance, total earnings, total withdrawn, a UPI withdrawal form with validation (min ₹500), and a withdrawal history list with status badges (pending/approved/rejected).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (emerald, gold, semantic tokens via oklch CSS variables), border radii, box shadows, animation keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the Super Gro daily-task earning app's architecture, existing features, known issues, image requirements, and versioned feature list used for build planning.
